glosses.vi: nữ thương nhân; người bán hàng nữ
glosses.ja: 女商人; 女性の売り手

sentences.target: Ich frage die Händlerin nach dem Preis.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈhɛndlɐʁɪn naːx deːm pʁaɪs./

translations.de: Ich frage die Händlerin nach dem Preis.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈhɛndlɐʁɪn naːx deːm pʁaɪs./
translations.en: I ask the vendor about the price.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la vendedora el precio.
translations.fr: Je demande le prix à la vendeuse.
translations.he: אני שואל את המוכרת על המחיר.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi người bán về giá.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de verkoopster naar de prijs.
translations.hi: मैं विक्रेता से कीमत पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω την πωλήτρια για την τιμή.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; governs an accusative object and a dative prepositional object with 'nach'.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks the direct object NP.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'frage'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the PP 'nach dem Preis' meaning 'about the price'.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Preis' governed by 'nach'.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Die Händlerin wiegt die Tomaten vor meinen Augen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈhɛndlɐʁɪn viːkt diː toˈmaːtən fɔʁ ˈmaɪnən ˈaʊɡən./

translations.de: Die Händlerin wiegt die Tomaten vor meinen Augen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈhɛndlɐʁɪn viːkt diː toˈmaːtən fɔʁ ˈmaɪnən ˈaʊɡən./
translations.en: The vendor weighs the tomatoes in front of me.
translations.es: La vendedora pesa los tomates delante de mí.
translations.fr: La vendeuse pèse les tomates devant moi.
translations.it: La venditrice pesa i pomodori davanti a me.
translations.ko: 상인이 내 앞에서 토마토의 무게를 잰다.
translations.zh-Hans: 女摊主当着我的面称番茄。
translations.yue: 女檔主喺我面前磅番茄。
translations.ru: Продавщица взвешивает помидоры у меня на глазах.
translations.pt: A vendedora pesa os tomates à minha frente.
translations.he: המוכרת שוקלת את העגבניות מול עיניי.
translations.vi: Người bán cân cà chua ngay trước mặt tôi.
translations.nl: De verkoopster weegt de tomaten waar ik bij sta.
translations.uk: Продавчиня зважує помідори у мене на очах.
translations.hu: Az eladónő a szemem láttára leméri a paradicsomokat.
translations.hi: विक्रेता मेरे सामने टमाटर तौलती है.
translations.pl: Sprzedawczyni waży pomidory na moich oczach.
translations.el: Η πωλήτρια ζυγίζει τις ντομάτες μπροστά μου.
translations.nb: Selgeren veier tomatene rett foran meg.
translations.id: Penjual menimbang tomat tepat di depan saya.
translations.ro: Vânzătoarea cântărește roșiile chiar în fața mea.
translations.cs: Prodavačka váží rajčata přímo přede mnou.
translations.da: Sælgeren vejer tomaterne lige foran mig.
translations.ja: 店員が目の前でトマトを量る。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object and an adverbial PP.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, plural; accusative as direct object of 'wiegt'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the adverbial PP 'vor meinen Augen'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; dative plural agreement with 'Augen'.
Common noun, plural; dative as the object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Meine Tante ist Händlerin in der Stadt.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪnə ˈtantə ɪst ˈhɛndlɐʁɪn ɪn deːʁ ʃtat./

translations.de: Meine Tante ist Händlerin in der Stadt.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪnə ˈtantə ɪst ˈhɛndlɐʁɪn ɪn deːʁ ʃtat./
translations.en: My aunt is a vendor in town.
translations.es: Mi tía es vendedora en la ciudad.
translations.fr: Ma tante est vendeuse en ville.
translations.it: Mia zia è venditrice in città.
translations.ru: Моя тётя работает продавщицей в городе.
translations.pt: Minha tia é vendedora na cidade.
translations.vi: Dì tôi bán hàng trong thành phố.
translations.nl: Mijn tante is verkoopster in de stad.
translations.uk: Моя тітка працює продавчинею в місті.
translations.hu: A nagynéném a városban árusként dolgozik.
translations.hi: मेरी मौसी शहर में सामान बेचती हैं.
translations.pl: Moja ciotka jest sprzedawczynią w mieście.
translations.el: Η θεία μου είναι πωλήτρια στην πόλη.
translations.nb: Tanten min jobber som selger i byen.
translations.id: Tante saya bekerja sebagai pedagang di kota.
translations.sv: Min moster är försäljare i stan.
translations.ro: Mătușa mea este vânzătoare în oraș.
translations.cs: Moje teta je ve městě prodavačkou.
translations.da: Min tante er sælger i byen.
translations.ja: 私のおばは町で商売をしている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; nominative feminine singular, modifying 'Tante'.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular serving as the subject.
Finite copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Predicate nominal (common noun, feminine); in nominative, complement of the copula 'ist'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the locative PP 'in der Stadt'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Stadt' governed by 'in'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Die Händlerin holt schnell frisches Brot.

translations.de: Die Händlerin holt schnell frisches Brot.
translations.en: The vendor quickly fetches fresh bread.
translations.es: La vendedora trae pan fresco rápidamente.
translations.fr: La vendeuse va vite chercher du pain frais.
translations.it: La venditrice va subito a prendere del pane fresco.
translations.zh-Hans: 女摊主很快拿来新鲜的面包。
translations.yue: 女檔主好快拎嚟新鮮麵包。
translations.pt: A vendedora traz pão fresco rapidamente.
translations.vi: Người bán nhanh chóng mang bánh mì mới ra.
translations.nl: De verkoopster haalt snel vers brood.
translations.hu: Az eladónő gyorsan friss kenyeret hoz.
translations.hi: विक्रेता जल्दी से ताज़ी ब्रेड ले आती है.
translations.el: Η πωλήτρια φέρνει γρήγορα φρέσκο ψωμί.
translations.id: Penjual dengan cepat mengambil roti segar.
translations.ja: 店員がすぐに焼きたてのパンを持ってくる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object; modified by the adverb 'schnell'.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb 'holt'.
Attributive adjective with strong inflection; accusative neuter singular agreeing with 'Brot'.
Common noun, neuter; accusative singular as the direct object of 'holt'.
